name: Black
description: Deterministic Python code formatter that enforces consistent coding style across software projects, improving code readability, maintainability, and collaboration in research teams.

indicators.Maintainability: measures Maintainability by enforcing a consistent and deterministic code style, reducing formatting-related complexity, minimizing stylistic discrepancies, and improving readability and long-term maintainability of Python codebases.

useCases: Automatically format Python code in CI/CD pipelines to enforce consistent coding standards
Improve readability and maintainability of research software by eliminating style inconsistencies
Reduce code review overhead by removing debates over formatting and style choices
Standardize code formatting across collaborative teams to enhance long-term maintainability
